title: Sweet And Crisp Russian Tomato Stir-fry
description: A low-calorie-friendly and tender sour dish featuring a sweet-sour sauce with tender tomatoes.

ingredients.name: tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Use low-sodium canned tomatoes or fresh, ripe ones.

ingredients.name: onion
ingredients.notes: Adjust quantity based on desired consistency of the sauce.

ingredients.name: soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Can be replaced with tamari or other gluten-free soy alternatives.

ingredients.name: sugar (brown for color)
ingredients.amount: 1 teaspoon, optional for flavor and appearance

ingredients.name: pepper flakes or red pepper flakes

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic, sauté until softened about 3 minutes.
Fold in ginger root. Cook for another minute.
Add halved tomatoes to the pan with water chestnuts (if using).
Pour in soy sauce, rice vinegar, sugar if using, and salt (optional). Stir well to combine all ingredients into a thin sauce.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and let cook until most of the liquid is absorbed about 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and serve immediately as an appetizer.
